pi_items.source: task.json prompt instructions and /usr/share/gpredict/data/satdata/satellites.dat confirming real NORAD IDs

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for gpredict_env ground_station_hw_config task by verifying the synthetically defined ground station 'GeorgiaTech' and its hardware setup. Confirmed that the requested rotator (G5500_AzEl), RX radio (IC9700_DL), TX radio (IC9700_UL), and AutoTrack module's 5 satellites (ISS, SO-50, AO-91, AO-92, CAS-4B) explicitly match the task description instructions. Their NORAD IDs correspond to real records in GPredict's built-in /usr/share/gpredict/data/satdata/satellites.dat. Additionally, discovered that the task is defective because 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, making the task unscorable.
